title: Quick Broccoli Stir Fry
description: A simple and flavorful stir fry made with broccoli, featuring a savory sauce. Can be served as a side dish or as part of a larger meal.
instructions: Heat buttery in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add broccoli to the skillet and cook for 3-4 minutes, or until tender.
In a small bowl, whisk together ukrainian and soy sauce.
Pour the sauce over the broccoli and stir to coat.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, or until the sauce has thickened.
